---
title: "My Session Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    self_contained: true
params:
  student_id:   ""
  session_id:   ""
  student_name: "Student"
  course_name:  "Course"
  session_date: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 6.5, fig.height = 3.5, dpi = 120)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

student_id <- params$student_id
session_id <- params$session_id

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))

# Load ALL data inside a single connection to avoid close-before-render issues
all_data <- with_connection(function(con) {
  snaps <- tryCatch(
    DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
      "SELECT emotion, concentration, captured_at
         FROM student_emotion_snapshots
        WHERE student_id = '%s' AND session_id = '%s'
        ORDER BY captured_at",
      student_id, session_id)),
    error = function(e) data.frame()
  )

  summary_row <- tryCatch(
    DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
      "SELECT avg_concentration, attentive_percentage, dominant_emotion,
              pct_happy, pct_sad, pct_angry, pct_confused, pct_neutral, pct_engaged,
              pct_distracted, snapshot_count
         FROM student_lecture_summaries
        WHERE student_id = '%s' AND session_id = '%s'
        LIMIT 1",
      student_id, session_id)),
    error = function(e) data.frame()
  )

  attendance <- tryCatch(
    DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
      "SELECT sa.status, sa.joined_at, sa.left_at
         FROM session_attendance sa
        WHERE sa.student_id = '%s' AND sa.session_id = '%s'
        LIMIT 1",
      student_id, session_id)),
    error = function(e) data.frame()
  )

  list(snaps = snaps, summary = summary_row, attendance = attendance)
})

snaps      <- all_data$snaps
sum_row    <- all_data$summary
attendance <- all_data$attendance
has_snaps  <- nrow(snaps) > 0
has_sum    <- nrow(sum_row) > 0

# Compute metrics preferring stored summary, fallback to raw snaps
if (has_sum) {
  avg_conc    <- as.numeric(sum_row$avg_concentration[1])
  attentive_p <- as.numeric(sum_row$attentive_percentage[1])
  dom_emotion <- sum_row$dominant_emotion[1]
} else if (has_snaps) {
  conc_map    <- c(high=0.85, medium=0.55, low=0.25, distracted=0.10)
  avg_conc    <- mean(conc_map[tolower(snaps$concentration)], na.rm=TRUE)
  attentive_p <- mean((tolower(snaps$concentration) %in% c("high","medium")) |
                      (tolower(snaps$emotion) == "engaged"), na.rm=TRUE)
  dom_emotion <- names(which.max(table(tolower(snaps$emotion))))
} else {
  avg_conc <- NA; attentive_p <- NA; dom_emotion <- "N/A"
}

conc_label <- function(v) {
  if (is.na(v)) return("N/A")
  paste0(round(v * 100, 0), "%")
}
```

<div style="background:#1E3A5F;color:white;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:20px">
<strong>Student:</strong> `r params$student_name` &nbsp;·&nbsp;
<strong>Course:</strong> `r params$course_name` &nbsp;·&nbsp;
<strong>Date:</strong> `r params$session_date`
</div>

## Summary

```{r summary-table}
kable(data.frame(
  Metric = c("Average Concentration","Attentiveness","Dominant Emotion",
             "Total Snapshots","Attendance Status"),
  Value  = c(
    conc_label(avg_conc),
    conc_label(attentive_p),
    tools::toTitleCase(as.character(dom_emotion)),
    if (has_snaps) as.character(nrow(snaps)) else "0",
    if (nrow(attendance) > 0) tools::toTitleCase(as.character(attendance$status[1])) else "N/A"
  )
), align = c("l","r"))
```

## Concentration Breakdown

```{r conc-chart}
if (has_snaps) {
  conc_f <- factor(tolower(snaps$concentration),
                   levels = c("high","medium","low","distracted"))
  conc_df <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(conc_f)) * 100)
  colnames(conc_df) <- c("level","pct")
  conc_df <- conc_df[conc_df$pct > 0, ]

  pal <- c(high="#10B981", medium="#3B82F6", low="#F59E0B", distracted="#EF4444")
  ggplot(conc_df, aes(x = reorder(level, -pct), y = pct, fill = level)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.55, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100), labels = function(x) paste0(x,"%")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "% of session", title = "Time at Each Concentration Level")
} else {
  cat("No concentration data for this session.")
}
```

## Emotion Distribution

```{r emo-chart}
if (has_snaps) {
  emo_df <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(tolower(snaps$emotion))) * 100)
  colnames(emo_df) <- c("emotion","pct")
  emo_df <- emo_df[emo_df$pct > 0, ]

  emo_pal <- c(happy="#10B981", engaged="#3B82F6", neutral="#94A3B8",
               confused="#F59E0B", sad="#8B5CF6", angry="#EF4444",
               surprised="#06B6D4", fearful="#FB923C", disgusted="#6366F1")
  ggplot(emo_df, aes(x = reorder(emotion, -pct), y = pct, fill = emotion)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.55, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = emo_pal) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100), labels = function(x) paste0(x,"%")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "% of session", title = "Emotion Distribution")
} else {
  cat("No emotion data for this session.")
}
```

## Concentration Timeline

```{r timeline}
if (has_snaps && "captured_at" %in% colnames(snaps)) {
  snaps$ts        <- as.POSIXct(snaps$captured_at)
  conc_map        <- c(high=85, medium=55, low=25, distracted=10)
  snaps$score     <- conc_map[tolower(snaps$concentration)]
  snaps$smooth    <- {
    x <- snaps$score
    vapply(seq_along(x), function(i) mean(x[max(1,i-4):i], na.rm=TRUE), numeric(1))
  }
  ggplot(snaps, aes(x = ts)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = score),  colour = "#CBD5E1", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = smooth), colour = "#3B82F6", linewidth = 1.3) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,100),
                       breaks=c(10,25,55,85),
                       labels=c("Distracted","Low","Medium","High")) +
    labs(x = "Time", y = "Concentration",
         title = "Your Concentration Throughout the Session",
         subtitle = "Blue line = 5-snapshot rolling average")
} else {
  cat("No timeline data available.")
}
```

## Attendance

```{r attendance}
if (nrow(attendance) > 0) {
  kable(data.frame(
    Field = c("Status","Joined At","Left At"),
    Value = c(
      tools::toTitleCase(as.character(attendance$status[1])),
      if (is.na(attendance$joined_at[1])) "—" else format(as.POSIXct(attendance$joined_at[1]), "%H:%M"),
      if (is.na(attendance$left_at[1]))   "—" else format(as.POSIXct(attendance$left_at[1]),   "%H:%M")
    )
  ), align = c("l","r"))
} else {
  cat("No attendance record found.")
}
```

---
*EduVision Analytics · `r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B %Y %H:%M")`*
